节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Interface for play parameters.
loop mode (0 = no loop, -1 = loop forever)
playback rate
left volume value(range = 0.0 to 1.0),current leftVolume = rightVolume
right volume value(range = 0.0 to 1.0),current leftVolume = rightVolume
stream priority (0 = lowest priority)
Flag indicating that the sound effect and audio can be played in parallel.
Interface for soundPool instance. Manages and plays sound. Before calling an SoundPool method, you must use createSoundPool() to create an SoundPool instance.
Load the sound from the specified path.
注释信息: @param {string} uri The path to the audio file
@param {AsyncCallback<number>} callback Callback a sound ID. This value can be used to play or unload the sound.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400102 - Operation not allowed. Return by callback.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400103 - I/O error. Return by callback.
@throws { BusinessError } 5400105 - Service died. Return by callback.

parameters.说明: The path to the audio file
Callback a sound ID. This value can be used to play or unload the sound.

error_codes.description: Operation not allowed. Return by callback.
I/O error. Return by callback.
Service died. Return by callback.
